title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Tama, Unknown person #5, Holdem, Unknown person #6, Kiku, Unknown person #7 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: BIG BROTO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gahaha Hahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You said you're gonna save her!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And how exactly do you plan on accomplish- ing that, eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go ahead and try to make a move...

dialogue.speaker: Holdem
dialogue.text: Kamijiro, the lion on my stomach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Will rip her to pieces!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GRRRR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Holdem
dialogue.text: Holdem's stomach KAMI JIRO*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let Tama Go!! I'll beat that lion up if you don't!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: O-TAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WooF WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Big Protection!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: G-KIKUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gahahaha!! Answer one thing for me, you idiots!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Did you know about this girl's ability!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to hold you all hostage so that we can lure out shutenmaru.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: don't play dumb. He's the leader of your gang of thieves, isn't that right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shuten- Maru...!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: You atamayama thieves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were responsible for the thieveries at the farm, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you were able to defeat someone as strong as urna, even if it was by sheer luck...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then you must be one of his top subordinates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: luffytaro... whatever you do, don't make him angry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But he's already angry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know, but we don't want to make him Angrier....!! Needless to say, he's strong...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But more importantly... the people of this town...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...are afraid of the one who backs him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's one of Kaido's most trusted Warriors, and a formidable member of the beasts pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His name is Jack the drought, and he is the true ruler of Kuri!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Isn't he the guy that destroyed Zou!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huh!? That was him!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cat and dog told us that he poisoned them... didn't the elephant send him and his crew flying away?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are they talking about... animals?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!? I was sure that Jack and his ship sank to the bottom of the ocean!!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: So you witnessed Jack's Maritime Accident?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way he's dead. He was spotted in this area a few days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHATA A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why if we anger holder... Jack, a calamity...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will come to take revenge... and this town will become a wasted.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!? That's just dirty! That means the people of this town are basically hostages, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, what are you all mumbling about over there!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hurry up and try to rescue this girl....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, though... the moment you make your move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is when she'll be ripped to pieces!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Grow!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: K'ya!!!! That Hurtssssssssssssssssssssssss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop it, you bastard!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
